title: Utility Integration Schema
description: Schema for rickshaw.json files inside utility subprojects (such as packrat).  Defines the utility's controller-side lifecycle scripts and engine file transfer configuration.

rickshaw-utility.description: Metadata block containing the schema version for this rickshaw.json utility file format.

version.description: The schema version this file conforms to.  Currently must be '2021.06.16'.

utility.description: The utility name, used to identify this utility throughout the system.

controller.description: Defines scripts that run on the controller to manage the utility's lifecycle.

pre-script.description: Script that runs on the controller before benchmark iterations begin.  Used for setup or preparation tasks.

post-script.description: Script that runs on the controller after benchmark iterations complete.  Typically handles post-processing of collected data.

engine.description: Defines the engine-side configuration for this utility, including file transfers from the controller.

files-from-controller.description: Files to copy from the controller to the engine before execution begins.

items.description: A file transfer specification defining source and destination paths.

src.description: Source path on the controller where the file is located.

dest.description: Destination path in the engine where the file will be placed.

required.description: Whether this file must exist on the controller.  If true and the file is missing, execution fails.  If false, the file is skipped if absent.
